title: sassia tetraphylla
intro: Sassia tetraphylla, also known as Sarcococca or Christmas box, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Buxaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sassia tetraphylla include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and aiding in digestion. Sassia tetraphylla is often prepared as a tea or herbal infusion, and it can also be used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
